# T-0

> Local-first browser terminal (real PTY) plus a Ratatui launcher for workspaces and coding agents. macOS.

Install with `npx t-0`, or `curl -fsSL https://t-0.dev/install | bash`. Opens at https://t0.localhost (portless) or http://127.0.0.1:4321. State lives in `~/.t-0`. Bind stays on localhost.

## Docs

- [Install / agent playbook](https://github.com/aatosolavi/t-0/blob/main/docs/for-coding-agents.md): install, verify, env vars
- [Install script](https://t-0.dev/install): canonical bash installer
- [GitHub](https://github.com/aatosolavi/t-0): source

## Optional

- [README](https://github.com/aatosolavi/t-0/blob/main/README.md): product overview
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/aatosolavi/t-0/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release notes
